description_long: This object is a compact semi-automatic handgun with a matte metallic slide and a wooden-textured grip. The slide appears slightly worn, with visible scuff marks and a utilitarian, no-nonsense finish. The grip is made of a dark, reddish-brown wood, contoured for ergonomic handling, and contrasts with the otherwise metallic construction. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is short and unadorned, with a simple circular muzzle and no visible threading or compensator. There are no visible engravings, logos, or decorative markings on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a minimalist and functional appearance.
description: A compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte metal slide and a contoured wooden grip, featuring a simple, utilitarian design with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, highlighting the wooden grip and the worn, matte metal slide.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the width of the slide and the narrow profile of the barrel and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the wooden grip and the slide, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the thickness of the slide, with the grip visible below.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is visually distinct with a dark, reddish-brown wooden appearance, featuring a smooth, contoured surface that fits comfortably in the hand. It lacks visible checkering or stippling but has subtle ergonomic shaping for improved handling. The grip is solid, with no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, emphasizing a classic and functional design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a robust enclosure for the trigger. It is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its size allows for easy finger access. The design is simple, lacking undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, with a plain, unthreaded muzzle and no external features such as compensators or fluting. The exterior finish matches the matte, slightly worn look of the slide, and there are no visible markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with only wear marks and a utilitarian finish.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flaring, or finger rests. It maintains a simple, squared-off profile and lacks any logos or texturing.
